message:
fix: handle ErrSessionNotFound when cleaning stale sessions in gt crew at

When RespawnPane fails with can't find pane, the code tries to kill
the stale session before recreating. However, by the time KillSession
runs, tmux may have already auto-destroyed the session. In that case,
KillSession returns ErrSessionNotFound, which caused the command to
fail on the first attempt.

Now we treat ErrSessionNotFound as success - if the session is already
gone, that's what we wanted anyway.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
